_publications._publicationTitle: Machine Learning of Allosteric Effects: The Analysis of Ligand-Induced Dynamics to Predict Functional Effects in TRAP1.

_contextSnippet: GDF-SVM gives models of high sensitivity for state I and specificity for state A in the training set...94.9 0.95 0.95
details: GDF-SVM models achieved the highest internal performance with 94.9% accuracy, 0.95 TPR and 0.95 TNR, outperforming generative models
